title: 100-Turn Playtest Rerun — Post Critical Fixes

turn1Baseline.notes: FIX #30 VERIFIED — player starts with 2 buildings (storm_transmitter + storage_hub), same as AI

turn10Checkpoint.notes: FIX #26 PARTIALLY VERIFIED — AI resources increased (volt +5, iron +6). Signal Choir lost 2 units. Cult spawned 2 units.

turn50Checkpoint.notes: Signal Choir and Iron Creed fully eliminated. Volt down to 1 unit. Cult stable at 2. combatKills still 0 despite unit deaths.

#26_harvestSystem.evidence: Volt resources +5 (35→40), Iron resources +6 (35→41) by turn 10. But resources stopped growing after turn 10 — likely harvested nearby salvage and then ran out of reachable resources. No new buildings constructed despite having resources.
#26_harvestSystem.remaining_issue: AI harvests initially but stops. Building construction via GOAP not triggering — AI never builds new structures beyond the 2 starters.

#27_combatRange.evidence: Units are dying (signal_choir 4→0, iron_creed 4→0 by turn 50) but combatKills counter shows 0 for ALL factions. Either: (a) kills happen but counter isn't incremented, (b) units die from non-combat causes, or (c) cult units are killing them but cult combatKills isn't tracked.
#27_combatRange.remaining_issue: combatKills counter never increments. Need to verify if the counter update is wired correctly in the combat resolution code.

#28_cultCap.evidence: Only 2 cult units (static_remnants) throughout the entire 100-turn game. Well under the 12 cap. Previous playtest had 20. Only 1 of 3 cult factions spawned.
#28_cultCap.remaining_issue: Only static_remnants spawns — null_monks and lost_signal never appear. Cult pressure may be too low now.

#29_aiDifferentiation.evidence: Cannot clearly distinguish faction behavior from stats alone. Signal Choir and Iron Creed were eliminated by turn 50 while Volt Collective survived — this COULD indicate differentiation (Volt's turtle personality keeping it alive) or could be map-position luck.
#29_aiDifferentiation.remaining_issue: Need diagnostic logging of GOAP evaluator choices per faction per turn to verify differentiation.

#30_playerBuildings.evidence: Player starts with 2 buildings (storm_transmitter + storage_hub) at turn 1. Same as all AI factions. Verified.

criticalIssuesRemaining.detail: All factions show combatKills=0 at turn 100, yet 11 units died (18→7 non-player units). The kill tracking in combat resolution is broken or not wired.
All factions still at 2 buildings (starters only) at turn 100. GOAP BuildEvaluator may not be triggering, or the build action fails silently.

criticalIssuesRemaining.issue: AI resource growth stalls after turn 10
criticalIssuesRemaining.detail: Volt went from 35→40 by turn 10 but stayed at 40 through turn 100. Either nearby salvage was depleted with no exploration to find more, or harvest action stopped being selected.

criticalIssuesRemaining.issue: Player resources unchanged — player faction is passive
criticalIssuesRemaining.detail: Player resources stayed at 15 (10 scrap + 5 ferrous) for all 100 turns. Expected since no player commands issued, but means the player faction's AI doesn't take actions even though it has units.
Only 2 cult units (static_remnants) in 100 turns. Previous playtest had 20 (too many). Now the pendulum has swung too far — cult threat is negligible. null_monks and lost_signal never spawn.
Game still shows 'playing' despite 2 factions eliminated. Victory conditions may require specific thresholds not yet met.

improvements: Player now starts with 2 buildings (was 0) — FIX #30 WORKS
AI harvests salvage early game (resources increase) — FIX #26 PARTIALLY WORKS
Cult units capped properly (2 vs previous 20) — FIX #28 WORKS
No 'target out of range' errors observed — FIX #27 LIKELY WORKS
Game runs full 100 turns without crashes
regressions: Cult threat went from too high (20 units) to too low (2 units)
AI economy stalls after initial harvesting
unchanged: No faction reaches any victory condition

jsErrors.warningDetail: THREE.Clock deprecated — use THREE.Timer instead (cosmetic, not functional)

1_AI_harvests_salvage.detail: Volt +5 resources, Iron +6 resources by turn 10. Harvesting works but stalls when nearby salvage depleted.

2_combat_kills_units.detail: 11 units died across 100 turns (signal_choir 4→0, iron_creed 4→0, volt 4→1) but combatKills=0 for ALL factions. Kill counter is not being incremented in combat resolution.

3_cult_count_within_cap.detail: Only 2 cult units (static_remnants) in 100 turns. Well under MAX_TOTAL_CULTISTS of 12. Previous playtest had 20.

4_factions_behave_differently.detail: Volt survived longest (1 unit at turn 100) while Signal Choir and Iron Creed eliminated by turn 50. Could indicate turtle personality working, but no GOAP diagnostic logs available to confirm evaluator choices differ.

5_player_starts_with_buildings.detail: Player starts with storm_transmitter + storage_hub at turn 1, same as all AI factions.

6_no_js_errors.detail: 0 JS errors in 100 turns. 1 cosmetic Three.js deprecation warning (THREE.Clock → THREE.Timer).

7_game_reaches_conclusion_or_balanced.detail: Game shows 'playing' at turn 100 despite 2 factions eliminated (signal_choir, iron_creed). No victory condition triggered. Game state is static — no meaningful progression after turn 50.

scorecard_summary: 4/7 PASS, 1 INCONCLUSIVE, 2 FAIL. Fixes #28 and #30 fully verified. Fix #26 partially works. Fixes #27 and #29 inconclusive. New issues: combatKills counter broken, AI never builds, cult pressure too low.
overallAssessment: Game health IMPROVED but not yet balanced. The critical fixes addressed the worst symptoms but underlying issues remain: AI building construction never triggers, combat kill tracking is broken, and cult pressure is now too low. The game loop (harvest→build→expand→fight) works for the first ~10 turns but stalls into a static state by mid-game.
